title: Init analyze doctor command modules
objective: Move init, analyze, and doctor command orchestration out of index.js without behavior drift.
description: Performs a pure extraction after safety behavior is tested.
parallel_safe_reason: This refactor depends on behavior being locked by previous tests.
must: Add or confirm golden tests before moving code.
Extract init command orchestration to commands/init.js.
Extract analyze command orchestration to commands/analyze.js.
Extract doctor command orchestration to commands/doctor.js.
Keep public exports stable where tests or users rely on them.
acceptance: Focused command tests pass before and after extraction.
No output, exit-code, or filesystem behavior changes beyond wiring.
Existing module exports remain compatible or are updated with tests.
validation_hints: Keep the extraction as pure as possible.
If behavior must change, stop and move it to the relevant behavior slice.
